enrichment.short_description: D-ID is an AI platform for creating talking-avatar videos and real-time conversational AI agents from scripts, documents, or photos.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: D-ID creates AI avatar videos, real-time conversational agents, and voice cloning in 120+ languages for marketing, sales, and training teams.

features.title: AI Video Studio
features.description: Generate avatar videos from a script or an uploaded document.

features.title: Real-time AI Avatars
features.description: Interactive, conversational digital humans for live engagement.

features.title: Voice Cloning
features.description: Clone a voice for consistent, on-brand narration across videos.

features.title: Lip-sync Animation
features.description: Deep-learning-based lip-sync technology for realistic avatar speech.

features.title: Multilingual Video Creation
features.description: Create and localize avatar videos in more than 120 languages.

features.title: API Access
features.description: Integrate avatar and video generation into custom applications via API.

features.title: Presentation Integrations
features.description: Connects with Microsoft PowerPoint, Canva, and Google Slides for avatar-narrated presentations.

pros: Supports more than 120 languages for avatar video and voice content
Offers both a no-code Studio interface and a developer API
Real-time conversational avatar agents for interactive use cases
Integrates with common presentation tools like PowerPoint and Google Slides
cons: Full pricing is not shown on one page — details are split across separate Studio and API pricing pages
Lower-cost Lite and Trial plan videos include a D-ID watermark
Credits/minutes do not roll over and expire monthly

faqs.question: Does D-ID offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, D-ID offers a free trial through its Studio product at studio.d-id.com.

faqs.question: What languages does D-ID support?
faqs.answer: D-ID supports video creation and real-time interactions in more than 120 languages.

faqs.question: Do D-ID videos include a watermark?
faqs.answer: Videos created on the Trial and Lite plans include a D-ID watermark; higher tiers remove it.

faqs.question: Can I integrate D-ID into my own app?
faqs.answer: Yes, D-ID provides an API for integrating avatar and video generation into custom applications.

faqs.question: Do unused credits roll over?
faqs.answer: No, D-ID states that minutes/credits renew monthly and unused amounts become void.

use_cases.title: Marketing and sales videos
use_cases.description: Create avatar-led product explainer and pitch videos from a script.

use_cases.title: Corporate training
use_cases.description: Produce consistent, on-brand training videos narrated by AI avatars.

use_cases.title: Interactive customer support
use_cases.description: Deploy real-time conversational avatars to handle customer interactions.

use_cases.title: Developer integrations
use_cases.description: Embed avatar video generation into products via the D-ID API.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is D-ID?
paragraphs: D-ID is an AI video creation platform that generates videos of digital humans from text scripts, documents, or images, using face animation, lip-sync, and voice cloning technology.
Beyond pre-recorded video, D-ID also offers real-time, LLM-powered conversational avatars that can hold interactive, emotionally responsive conversations with users.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who D-ID is for
paragraphs: D-ID is aimed at marketing, sales, L&D, and customer service teams that want to produce avatar-led video content without filming, as well as developers who want to embed avatar video generation into their own products via API.

enrichment.short_description: Yepic AI generates custom AI avatar videos and real-time, emotion-aware conversational video agents in 120+ languages.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Yepic AI turns scripts and photos into custom AI avatar videos and real-time conversational video agents, with plans from $20/month.

features.title: Studio Express Avatars
features.description: Create custom AI avatar videos in minutes from a script or photo.

features.title: Video Agents
features.description: Real-time, LLM-powered conversational avatars for interactive experiences.

features.title: Talking Photos
features.description: Animate still photos into speaking AI avatars.

features.title: Emotion Recognition
features.description: Tracks facial expressions in real time and adjusts conversational responses accordingly.

features.title: Video Dubbing (VidVoice.ai)
features.description: Lip-sync dubbing for multilingual video localization.

features.title: API Access
features.description: Developer API available from the Creator plan upward.

pros: Free Starter tier with 10 one-time credits to test the platform
Real-time, emotion-aware conversational avatars, not just static video generation
Supports 120+ languages and dialects for avatars and dubbing
API access available starting on the Creator plan
cons: Entry Basic plan ($20/month) caps credits at 200/month and includes a watermark
API access and watermark-free output require at least the $79/month Creator plan
Enterprise pricing is custom/quote-only

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Yepic AI offers a free Starter tier with 10 one-time credits and limited features.

faqs.question: How much does Yepic AI cost?
faqs.answer: Paid plans start at $20/month (Basic) and range up to $1,999/month (AI Team Member), plus custom Enterprise pricing.

faqs.question: Does Yepic AI support real-time conversations?
faqs.answer: Yes, its Video Agents use LLMs, including GPT-3.5, 4, and 4o, for real-time conversational avatars.

faqs.question: How many languages does Yepic AI support?
faqs.answer: Yepic AI supports over 120 languages and various dialects.

faqs.question: Is annual billing available?
faqs.answer: Yes, all paid plans offer annual billing at a discount versus monthly.

use_cases.title: Corporate e-learning
use_cases.description: Produce avatar-led training videos for employee onboarding and courses.

use_cases.title: Customer support agents
use_cases.description: Deploy real-time conversational avatars to handle routine customer questions.

use_cases.title: Multilingual video localization
use_cases.description: Dub and lip-sync existing videos into other languages using VidVoice.ai.

features: Fully customizable features for large organizations

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Yepic AI?
paragraphs: Yepic AI is a London-based AI video platform that creates custom talking-avatar videos from a script or photo, and offers real-time video agents that hold LLM-powered conversations while tracking user facial expressions to adapt their tone.
It also includes VidVoice.ai, a dubbing tool that lip-syncs translated audio onto existing footage for multilingual localization.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Yepic AI is for
paragraphs: Yepic AI targets e-learning, healthcare, customer support, financial services, and hospitality organizations that want avatar-based video or real-time conversational agents without production crews.

name: Rephrase.ai
skip_reason: Rephrase.ai was acquired by Adobe in November 2023 and its standalone product/website is no longer operating independently — the site could not be reliably fetched, and public reporting indicates the team and technology were folded into Adobe Firefly Video rather than continuing as a separate product.

enrichment.short_description: Vidnoz is an AI video platform with a large library of avatars, voices, and templates for creating, dubbing, and translating videos.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Vidnoz offers free AI avatars, voice cloning, and 2,800+ templates to create and translate videos in 140+ languages.

features.title: AI Avatars
features.description: 1,900+ realistic AI avatars with natural expressions and body language.

features.title: AI Voices & Cloning
features.description: 2,000+ AI voices, including voice cloning.

features.title: Video Templates
features.description: 2,800+ templates across multiple industries and use cases.

features.title: Video Translation & Dubbing
features.description: Translates and dubs videos into 140+ languages with lip-sync.

features.title: Custom Avatar Creation
features.description: Build a custom AI avatar from a user-supplied photo.

features.title: Daily Free Credits
features.description: The free plan grants 60 credits every day.

pros: Free plan grants daily credits at no cost
Very large avatar (1,900+), voice (2,000+), and template (2,800+) libraries
Video translation and dubbing supports 140+ languages
States ISO/IEC 27001:2022 compliance
cons: Free plan videos are capped at 3 minutes and carry a watermark
Paid tiers use a per-credit pricing model rather than flat monthly pricing
Enterprise features like a custom data center or dedicated account manager require contacting sales

faqs.question: Is Vidnoz free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the free plan grants daily credits with 720p export and videos capped at 3 minutes.

faqs.question: How does paid pricing work?
faqs.answer: Paid plans are credit-based at $2/credit — Starter includes 15 credits/month and Business includes 30 credits/month.

faqs.question: Does Vidnoz support video translation?
faqs.answer: Yes, Vidnoz translates and dubs videos into 140+ languages with lip-sync.

faqs.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 7-day money-back guarantee is offered on annual plans.

faqs.question: Can teams collaborate in Vidnoz?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Business plan supports team collaboration for up to 1,000 users.

use_cases.title: E-learning content
use_cases.description: Build avatar-led training and course videos.

use_cases.title: Sales and marketing videos
use_cases.description: Create and translate promotional videos using AI avatars and voices.

use_cases.title: Multilingual localization
use_cases.description: Translate and dub existing videos into 140+ languages.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Vidnoz?
paragraphs: Vidnoz is an AI video creation platform offering thousands of avatars, voices, and templates, along with tools for video translation and dubbing into more than 140 languages.
A free plan gives users 60 credits per day to try avatar and voice features before upgrading to a credit-based paid plan.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Vidnoz is for
paragraphs: Vidnoz is built for teams and individuals producing e-learning, marketing, training, and support videos who want a large, ready-made library of avatars and templates plus multilingual translation.

enrichment.short_description: Captions is an AI video editor that auto-edits raw footage, adds stylized captions, and generates AI-avatar 'digital twin' videos.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Captions is an AI video editor with auto-editing, 100+ caption styles, AI avatars, and translation into 100+ languages, from $24.99/month.

features.title: AI Edit
features.description: Automatically edits raw footage into a finished video in a chosen style, including cuts and B-roll.

features.title: Auto-captions
features.description: Generates stylized captions with 100+ styles to choose from.

features.title: AI Avatars / Digital Twin
features.description: Generates an AI version of the user to appear in videos.

features.title: Translation
features.description: Translates videos into 100+ languages.

features.title: Eye Contact Correction
features.description: Automatically fixes inconsistent eye contact or awkward glances on camera.

features.title: Denoising
features.description: Removes unwanted background noise from audio.

features.title: Text-to-edit
features.description: Directs edits and updates using simple text prompts.

features.title: AI Music Generation
features.description: Generates royalty-free music or sound effects.

pros: Free tier available with basic trimming and transition tools
Mobile apps for iOS and Android in addition to the web app
AI Edit and digital-twin avatar features go beyond basic captioning
States a 20M+ user base
cons: Generative AI features (AI Edit, avatars, translation) require the paid Max plan or higher
Higher Scale tiers cost $69.99-$279.99/month for additional monthly credits
Displayed pricing is stated by the company to reflect iOS plans only

faqs.question: Does Captions have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free version includes basic trimming, transitions, and media library assets.

faqs.question: What's the cheapest paid plan?
faqs.answer: Max, at $24.99/month, with 500 monthly credits and full AI editing features.

faqs.question: Does Captions support multiple languages?
faqs.answer: Yes, Captions can translate videos into 100+ languages.

faqs.question: Is there a mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes, Captions is available on the iOS App Store and Google Play.

faqs.question: Is there an enterprise plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, with custom pricing, bulk credit discounts, and dedicated account management.

use_cases.title: Social content creation
use_cases.description: Turn raw footage into edited, captioned short videos.

use_cases.title: Multilingual content
use_cases.description: Translate videos to reach international audiences.

use_cases.title: Personal AI avatar videos
use_cases.description: Generate videos of a 'digital twin' avatar without filming.

features: Basic trimming, transitions, and media library assets

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Captions?
paragraphs: Captions is an AI-powered video editor that automatically turns raw footage into an edited video, handling scene cuts, B-roll, transitions, music, and stylized captions.
It also offers AI avatars, eye-contact correction, denoising, and translation into 100+ languages, with access via web browser and mobile apps.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Captions is for
paragraphs: Captions targets individual content creators, marketers, podcasters, and small businesses producing short-form social video who want AI to handle most of the editing work.

enrichment.short_description: Wisecut is an AI video editor that turns long videos into short clips using automatic highlight detection, captions, and silence removal.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Wisecut uses AI to turn long videos into short clips with highlight detection, auto captions, silence removal, and music, from $15.75/month.

features.title: AI Highlight Detection
features.description: Automatically identifies noteworthy moments in long videos.

features.title: Auto Captions & Translation
features.description: Generates and translates subtitles automatically.

features.title: Silence Removal
features.description: Automatically detects and cuts silent pauses.

features.title: Smart Background Music
features.description: Auto-selects and adjusts background music with audio ducking.

features.title: Auto Reframe
features.description: Adapts videos to vertical, square, or horizontal formats.

features.title: Studio Voice
features.description: Refines audio quality and cancels background noise.

features.title: Auto Punch-in/out
features.description: Adds automated zoom transitions on key moments.

pros: Free plan available with 30 minutes/month of processing
Storyboard/transcription-based editing avoids manual timeline work
Autopilot plan can monitor a YouTube channel and auto-clip and schedule new videos
States 1M+ creators use the platform
cons: Free plan projects expire after 7 days and are capped at 30 minutes/month
Social media auto-posting requires the higher-priced Starter+ or Professional+ tiers
4K export is only available on Professional-tier plans and above

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, with 30 minutes/month of processing; projects expire after 7 days.

faqs.question: What's the cheapest paid plan?
faqs.answer: Starter, at $15.75/month or $189/year, with 480 minutes/month and 1080p export.

faqs.question: Can Wisecut auto-post to social media?
faqs.answer: Yes, on the Starter+ and Professional+ plans, which add auto-posting and content scheduling.

faqs.question: Does Wisecut support 4K export?
faqs.answer: Yes, on the Professional and Professional+ plans.

faqs.question: What is the Autopilot plan?
faqs.answer: A $49/month plan that monitors a YouTube channel and automatically creates and schedules clips.

use_cases.title: Short-form repurposing
use_cases.description: Convert long-form videos into short clips for social platforms.

use_cases.title: Podcast and testimonial editing
use_cases.description: Remove silences and add captions to spoken-word video.

use_cases.title: Channel automation
use_cases.description: Auto-monitor a YouTube channel and generate and schedule clips.

features: Social media management for up to 3 accounts per network

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Wisecut?
paragraphs: Wisecut is an AI video editor that turns long recordings into short, engaging clips by automatically detecting highlights, removing silences, and generating captions.

It also offers auto background music with audio ducking, automated reframing for different aspect ratios, and an Autopilot plan that can monitor a YouTube channel and automatically clip and schedule new uploads.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Wisecut is for
paragraphs: Wisecut is aimed at content creators, podcasters, and media teams who want to repurpose long-form video into short clips without manual timeline editing.

enrichment.short_description: Vizard uses AI to find highlights in long videos and turn them into captioned, vertical clips for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Vizard's AI finds highlights in long videos and turns them into captioned, vertical clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

features.title: AI Clipping
features.description: Finds engaging moments in long videos and reframes them to vertical format.

features.title: AI Captions & Emoji
features.description: Auto-generates captions with emoji suggestions.

features.title: AI B-roll
features.description: Adds supplementary footage automatically.

features.title: Text-Based Editing
features.description: Trims videos by deleting the corresponding transcript text.

features.title: Caption Translation
features.description: Translates captions into 100+ languages.

features.title: Brand Templates
features.description: Customizable templates for consistent branding across clips.

features.title: Team Workspace
features.description: Invite team members and share previews for collaboration.

pros: Free plan with 60 credits/month and no signup required to try it
Caption translation into 100+ languages
Text-based editing lets users trim video by editing the transcript
States ratings of 4.7-4.9 stars across G2, Capterra, Software Advice, and GetApp
cons: Free plan is limited to 720p export and only 3-day project storage
Watermark-free export requires a paid Creator or Business plan
Exact paid-plan prices are not shown without configuring billing on the pricing page

faqs.question: Is Vizard free to try?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free plan gives 60 credits/month with no signup required to start.

faqs.question: What does a credit represent?
faqs.answer: One credit equals one minute of uploaded video.

faqs.question: Does the free plan include a watermark?
faqs.answer: Free-plan output is limited to 720p export; removing the watermark requires a paid plan.

faqs.question: Can teams collaborate in Vizard?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Business plan adds a shared workspace and team member invites.

faqs.question: What platforms are the clips optimized for?
faqs.answer: TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

use_cases.title: Podcast and long-video repurposing
use_cases.description: Auto-generate short clips from long recordings.

use_cases.title: Social media marketing
use_cases.description: Produce branded, captioned clips for multiple platforms.

use_cases.title: Multilingual reach
use_cases.description: Translate captions to publish clips for international audiences.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Vizard?
paragraphs: Vizard is an AI video editing platform that automatically finds engaging moments in long-form video, reframes them to vertical format, and adds captions, emoji, and B-roll for social media clips.
It also offers text-based editing, where trimming the transcript trims the video, plus caption translation into 100+ languages and team collaboration features.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Vizard is for
paragraphs: Vizard is built for content creators, podcasters, coaches, and marketing teams who want to repurpose long-form video into short clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

enrichment.short_description: Munch (Munch Studio) uses AI to repurpose long-form video into short social clips and generate an ongoing social content plan for small businesses.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Munch Studio uses AI to repurpose long videos into short clips and auto-generate a social content strategy, with plans from $38/month.

features.title: AI Video Repurposing
features.description: Converts long-form video into short social clips (500-1,000 minutes/month depending on plan).

features.title: AI Video Scripts
features.description: Generates video scripts for content, from 5/week up to unlimited depending on plan.

features.title: AI Content Generation
features.description: Creates ongoing social posts tailored to a custom content strategy trained on the business's own materials.

features.title: Multi-platform Publishing
features.description: Publishes content to Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, and TikTok.

features.title: Performance Dashboard
features.description: Tracks reach, engagement, and follower growth.

features.title: Multi-Brand Management
features.description: Agencies can manage an isolated content hub for each client.

pros: 7-day free trial available with no upfront payment
Combines AI video repurposing with broader social content generation and scheduling in one workflow
Publishes directly to Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, and TikTok
Supports multi-brand/agency management with isolated client hubs
cons: No permanent free plan — only a time-limited free trial
Entry Essential plan caps video repurposing at 500 minutes and 10 generated videos per month
Multi-brand/agency pricing beyond the two published plans is not published

faqs.question: Does Munch Studio have a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 7-day free trial is offered on both plans.

faqs.question: What's the starting price?
faqs.answer: The Essential plan is $38/month, or $456/year billed annually.

faqs.question: What does Munch Studio do with video?
faqs.answer: It repurposes long-form video into short clips — 500 minutes/month on Essential and 1,000 minutes/month on Premium.

faqs.question: Which platforms can I publish to?
faqs.answer: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, and TikTok.

faqs.question: Is there a plan for agencies?
faqs.answer: Yes, multi-brand options are available for agencies managing multiple clients.

use_cases.title: Small business social media
use_cases.description: Automate video repurposing and posting without an in-house content team.

use_cases.title: Agency client management
use_cases.description: Manage multiple client accounts, each in its own isolated content hub.

use_cases.title: Solo creator repurposing
use_cases.description: Turn recorded videos or Zoom calls into short-form social clips.

features: Same as monthly Essential, billed yearly
Same as monthly Premium, billed yearly

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Munch?
paragraphs: Munch, now operating as Munch Studio, is an AI platform that repurposes long-form video, photos, and recordings into short social media clips and pairs that with AI-generated scripts and an ongoing content strategy.
It publishes directly to Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, and TikTok, and tracks performance through a built-in dashboard.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Munch is for
paragraphs: Munch Studio targets small business owners, solo consultants, and marketing agencies who want to hand off video repurposing and day-to-day social posting to AI.

enrichment.short_description: Quso.ai uses AI to turn long videos into short, captioned clips and schedules them across social platforms.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Quso.ai's AI turns long videos into short, captioned clips and schedules them across TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts, and more, from $29/month.

features.title: AI Clips Generator
features.description: Scores video moments by virality potential and cuts clips automatically.

features.title: AI Subtitle Generator
features.description: Word-level animated captions in 50+ languages with filler-word removal.

features.title: Social Media Scheduler
features.description: Multi-platform posting calendar for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, Facebook, and X.

features.title: Brand Kit
features.description: Custom fonts, colors, and logos for consistent branding.

features.title: AI Content Planner
features.description: Organizes content across platforms on a monthly basis.

features.title: Social Media Analytics
features.description: Performance tracking and optimization insights.

features.title: Text-Based Video Editor
features.description: Filler-word removal and B-roll integration via transcript editing.

pros: Free plan available with no credit card required, 75 credits/month
Scheduler and analytics built in alongside clip generation
Caption and subtitle generation supports 50+ languages
States it is 'trusted by 4M+ creators'
cons: Free plan is capped at 720p export and 7-day data retention
Advanced editor and 1080p export require at least the $29/month Lite plan
Filler/silence removal and Content Planner require the $39/month Essential plan or higher

faqs.question: Is Quso.ai free?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free plan is available with 75 credits/month and no credit card required.

faqs.question: What's the cheapest paid plan?
faqs.answer: Lite, at $29/month or $19/month billed annually.

faqs.question: How many languages are supported for captions?
faqs.answer: 50+ languages, via the AI Subtitle Generator.

faqs.question: Does Quso.ai include a scheduler?
faqs.answer: Yes, a social media scheduler for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, Facebook, and X.

faqs.question: Does annual billing save money?
faqs.answer: Yes, annual billing saves about 33% and doubles the included credits.

use_cases.title: Podcast and long-form repurposing
use_cases.description: Extract and schedule viral-scored clips from long recordings.

use_cases.title: Agency content operations
use_cases.description: Plan, brand, and schedule client social content.

use_cases.title: Brand social growth
use_cases.description: Track performance and repurpose video into on-brand clips.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Quso.ai?
paragraphs: Quso.ai is an AI video repurposing platform that scores moments in long-form video by virality potential, cuts them into short clips, and adds animated, multilingual captions.
It also includes a social media scheduler, brand kit, content planner, and analytics so clips can be published and tracked across multiple platforms from one place.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Quso.ai is for
paragraphs: Quso.ai is aimed at creators, podcasters, agencies, and brands that want to repurpose long-form content into short-form social clips and manage publishing and analytics in one tool.

name: Podcastle
skip_reason: Podcastle officially rebranded to Async in early 2026 — podcastle.ai now permanently redirects to async.com, and the company's own announcement states the 'Podcastle' name and identity have been retired in favor of a broader, differently-named AI creative platform. Cataloguing current site content under the 'Podcastle' name would misrepresent the current product.
